evals.prompt: Write a Python script that dubs the video at ~/videos/promo.mp4 into Spanish using ElevenLabs. It should upload the file, wait for processing to finish, and download the final dubbed audio when it's done.
evals.expected_output: Python script driving the Dubbing Projects API end-to-end: create project, poll until ready, add Spanish, poll until completed, download output
expectations: Creates a project via POST /v1/dubbing/project with a multipart file upload
Does not use the deprecated legacy /v1/dubbing endpoint (NOT '/v1/dubbing')
Does not use the deprecated legacy dubbing SDK methods (NOT 'client.dubbing', NOT 'elevenlabs.dubbing')
Sends the API key in the xi-api-key header from the ELEVENLABS_API_KEY environment variable
Adds Spanish via POST /v1/dubbing/project/{project_id}/language with target_language 'es'
Polls the language until status is 'completed'
Downloads the dubbed audio from the outputs.lossless_audio URL

evals.prompt: I have an ElevenLabs dubbing project (id proj_1601kwkyxp0hfzvtmyxwqxx6mcy3) that just finished transcribing. Before I add any languages I want to fix a recurring transcription mistake: the product name should be 'Acme Cloud', not 'Acme Crowd'. Write a Python script that fetches the source transcript, finds every segment containing 'Acme Crowd', and corrects it.
evals.expected_output: Python script that reads the source transcript and PATCHes each offending segment's text
expectations: Fetches the source transcript via GET /v1/dubbing/project/{project_id}/transcript
Iterates segments and matches those whose text contains the wrong phrase
Edits each matched segment via PATCH /v1/dubbing/project/{project_id}/transcript/segment/{segment_id} using the segment's id from the transcript response
Sends only the changed field in the PATCH body (just 'text'), not the full segment
Uses the xi-api-key header for authentication

evals.prompt: The Spanish dub of my ElevenLabs project has one bad translation. Project id is proj_1601kwkyxp0hfzvtmyxwqxx6mcy3, language id is lang_1001kwkyxp0je6ktn4knsfrasx5s, segment id is 0199a3f0-1c2d-7abc-8def-0123456789ab. Write a script that replaces that segment's translation with 'Bienvenido a nuestra última demostración de producto.', regenerates the dub, waits for it to finish, and downloads the new audio.
evals.expected_output: Script that edits the translation, triggers a regeneration, polls until complete, and downloads the fresh output
expectations: Updates the translation via PATCH /v1/dubbing/project/{project_id}/language/{language_id}/transcript/segment/{segment_id} with a 'translation' field in the JSON body
Polls the language status until it is 'completed' rather than using a single fixed sleep
Downloads the refreshed outputs.lossless_audio URL only after completion (the signed URL comes from re-fetching the language)
